headline: Amphenol Looks Pricey at 30X P/E, Yet Nearly Priceless: Buy or Wait?
summary: APH trades near 30X earnings, but AI demand, record orders and rising estimates continue to support its premium valuation.

raw.headline: Amphenol Looks Pricey at 30X P/E, Yet Nearly Priceless: Buy or Wait?

headline: TE Connectivity declares quarterly dividend
summary: TE Connectivity plc (NYSE: TEL) announced today that its board of directors declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.78 per ordinary share, payable on September 11, 2026, to shareholders of record at the close of business on August 21, 2026.
